embeds.title: Song of Memento - Indonesian Cover by Neitz | #MorimensFanArt
embeds.description:
for the V2.5 UGC Creation Submission event :3
hope y'all enjoy! this collab has been really wonderful, the story is really touching and Saya is, well, Saya 
Go play Morimens now if you haven't, it's a fun deck building game and the story is really really good especially if you like eldritch horror!
